name: TransactionLifecycleAndCategoryAllocation
description: Append-only transaction void or supersession events and category allocation history; other dimensions have their own explicit histories.
schema_def: transaction_lifecycle_event: id, transactionId, type void or superseded, optional replacementTransactionId, required reason, actor, trusted time; at most one active terminal event. category_allocation_event: id, transactionId, categoryId, action assign or correct, optional previousEventId, reason, actor, trusted time; exactly zero or one active allocation. Constraints: facts never update; supersession does not transfer evidence, reconciliation, pool, payment attribution, category, or relationship state; historical catalogue references use RESTRICT.
